title: QaScriptSidecar
description: JSON shape of a per-criterion `<criterion-id>.script.json` sidecar recording the canonical (script_hash, script_commit_sha, deps_hash) triple captured at the most recent qa-sweep run. Block-level criterion entries snapshot the same triple inline; this sidecar is the single-source-of-truth view of 'is checker X currently stale globally?'. A checker bug fix changes script_hash, which invalidates every verdict that checker ever wrote, corpus-wide.

$schema.description: Schema marker for this sidecar format.

source_file.description: Path (repo-relative) to the checker's source file.

script_hash.description: 12-char SHA-256 prefix of the checker source file's content.

script_commit_sha.description: Full git SHA of the most recent commit touching source_file.

extra_inputs.description: Optional repo-relative paths to extra-input files the checker consults (e.g. cached audit witnesses, the bibliography database).

deps_hash.description: 12-char SHA-256 prefix of the concatenated extra_inputs content (omitted if none).

last_run_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent qa-sweep run.

last_run_sha.description: Repo HEAD at the most recent sweep (full git SHA).
